reasoning: The control CA-2 (3) focuses on leveraging results from external organizations for control assessments, which is a process-oriented control related to compliance and auditing frameworks. This control is about integrating external security assessment results into the organization's compliance processes. Kubernetes does not have a direct equivalent for this control as it pertains to organizational processes rather than specific technical configurations or security features within Kubernetes. Kubernetes security checks are more focused on technical configurations such as RBAC, NetworkPolicies, and other security mechanisms within the cluster itself.
title: Control Assessments | Leveraging Results from External Organizations
